input.content:
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Contextual Equivalence ≡ Applicative Bisimilarity for PCF *)

(** ** Types *)
Inductive ty : Type :=
| TNat : ty
| TArr : ty -> ty -> ty.

Lemma ty_eq_dec : forall (T1 T2 : ty), {T1 = T2} + {T1 <> T2}.
Proof. decide equality. Defined.

(** ** Terms (de Bruijn) *)
Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tLam (A : ty) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tZero
| tSucc (t : tm)
| tPred (t : tm)
| tIfz (scrut : tm) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| tFix (A : ty) (t : tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)
Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tLam A t => tLam A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (rename ξ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (rename ξ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (rename ξ s) (rename ξ tz)
      (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  end.

Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add 1) t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tLam A t => tLam A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (apply_sub σ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (apply_sub σ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (apply_sub σ s) (apply_sub σ tz) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

(** ** Typing *)
Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : list ty) (x : nat) : option ty :=
  nth_error Γ x.

Inductive has_type : list ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
| ty_var Γ x T :
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some T -> has_type Γ (tVar x) T
| ty_lam Γ A B t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t B -> has_type Γ (tLam A t) (TArr A B)
| ty_app Γ t u A B :
    has_type Γ t (TArr A B) -> has_type Γ u A ->
    has_type Γ (tApp t u) B
| ty_zero Γ : has_type Γ tZero TNat
| ty_succ Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat -> has_type Γ (tSucc t) TNat
| ty_pred Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat -> has_type Γ (tPred t) TNat
| ty_ifz Γ s tz ts A :
    has_type Γ s TNat -> has_type Γ tz A ->
    has_type (TNat :: Γ) ts A -> has_type Γ (tIfz s tz ts) A
| ty_fix Γ A t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t A -> has_type Γ (tFix A t) A.

(** ** Values *)
Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_lam : forall A t, value (tLam A t)
| v_zero : value tZero
| v_succ : forall v, value v -> value (tSucc v).

(** ** Big-step evaluation *)
Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v : value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body v2 v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) -> eval t2 v2 ->
    eval (subst0 v2 body) v -> eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v : eval t v -> eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t : eval t tZero -> eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v : eval t (tSucc v) -> eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v :
    eval s tZero -> eval tz v -> eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v :
    eval s (tSucc n) -> eval (subst0 n ts) v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v -> eval (tFix A body) v.

Definition terminates (t : tm) : Prop := exists v, eval t v.

(** ** Contexts *)
Inductive ctx : Type :=
| cHole | cLam (A : ty) (C : ctx)
| cAppL (C : ctx) (u : tm) | cAppR (t : tm) (C : ctx)
| cSucc (C : ctx) | cPred (C : ctx)
| cIfzS (C : ctx) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| cIfzT (s : tm) (C : ctx) (ts : tm)
| cIfzE (s : tm) (tz : tm) (C : ctx)
| cFix (A : ty) (C : ctx).

Fixpoint plug (C : ctx) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match C with
  | cHole => t | cLam A C => tLam A (plug C t)
  | cAppL C u => tApp (plug C t) u | cAppR f C => tApp f (plug C t)
  | cSucc C => tSucc (plug C t) | cPred C => tPred (plug C t)
  | cIfzS C tz ts => tIfz (plug C t) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C ts => tIfz s (plug C t) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C => tIfz s tz (plug C t)
  | cFix A C => tFix A (plug C t)
  end.

(** ** Contextual equivalence *)
Definition ctx_equiv (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T /\
  forall C,
    (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) ->
    (terminates (plug C t1) <-> terminates (plug C t2)).

(** ** Applicative bisimulation *)
Definition rel := ty -> tm -> tm -> Prop.

Definition is_bisimulation (R : rel) : Prop :=
  forall T t1 t2, R T t1 t2 ->
    has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T /\
    match T with
    | TNat =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\ v1 = v2) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\ v1 = v2)
    | TArr A B =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u)) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u))
    end.

Definition bisimilar (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  exists R, is_bisimulation R /\ R T t1 t2.

(** ** Infrastructure lemmas *)

Lemma eval_val_is_value : forall t v, eval t v -> value v.
Proof.
  induction 1.
  - assumption.         (* eval_val *)
  - apply IHeval3.      (* eval_app *)
  - apply v_succ, IHeval. (* eval_succ *)
  - apply v_zero.       (* eval_pred_zero *)
  - inversion IHeval; assumption. (* eval_pred_succ *)
  - apply IHeval2.      (* eval_ifz_zero *)
  - apply IHeval2.      (* eval_ifz_succ *)
  - apply IHeval.       (* eval_fix *)
Qed.

Lemma eval_deterministic : forall t v1 v2,
  eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma subst0_typing : forall A s t B,
  has_type [] s A -> has_type (A :: []) t B ->
  has_type [] (subst0 s t) B.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma eval_preserves_has_type : forall t v T,
  eval t v -> has_type [] t T -> has_type [] v T.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma value_tnat_shape : forall v,
  value v -> has_type [] v TNat ->
  v = tZero \/ (exists n, value n /\ v = tSucc n).
Proof.
  intros v Hv Hty. inversion Hv; subst.
  - inversion Hty.
  - left. reflexivity.
  - right. exists v0. split; auto.
Qed.

(** Omega, the diverging term *)
Definition omega : tm := tFix TNat (tVar 0).

Lemma omega_diverges : forall v, ~ eval omega v.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma eval_tIfz_inv : forall s tz ts v,
  eval (tIfz s tz ts) v ->
  (eval s tZero /\ eval tz v) \/
  (exists n, eval s (tSucc n) /\ eval (subst0 n ts) v).
Proof. Admitted.

(** Test contexts *)
Definition is_zero_ctx : ctx := cIfzS cHole tZero omega.
Definition is_succ_ctx : ctx := cIfzS cHole omega tZero.

Lemma is_zero_ctx_typing : forall t,
  has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_zero_ctx t) TNat.
Proof.
  intros. unfold is_zero_ctx. simpl.
  apply ty_ifz; auto. apply ty_zero.
  unfold omega. apply ty_fix. apply ty_var. simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma is_succ_ctx_typing : forall t,
  has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_succ_ctx t) TNat.
Proof.
  intros. unfold is_succ_ctx. simpl.
  apply ty_ifz; auto.
  - unfold omega. apply ty_fix. apply ty_var. simpl. reflexivity.
  - apply ty_zero.
Qed.

Lemma is_zero_ctx_terminates_zero : forall t,
  has_type [] t TNat -> eval t tZero ->
  terminates (plug is_zero_ctx t).
Proof.
  intros. unfold is_zero_ctx. simpl.
  exists tZero. eapply eval_ifz_zero; eauto. apply eval_val; constructor.
Qed.

Lemma is_succ_ctx_terminates_succ : forall t n,
  has_type [] t TNat -> eval t (tSucc n) ->
  terminates (plug is_succ_ctx t).
Proof.
  intros. unfold is_succ_ctx. simpl.
  exists tZero. eapply eval_ifz_succ; eauto. simpl. apply eval_val; constructor.
Qed.

Lemma is_zero_ctx_not_succ : forall t n,
  has_type [] t TNat -> eval t (tSucc n) ->
  ~ terminates (plug is_zero_ctx t).
Proof.
  intros t n Hty Heval [v Hplug].
  unfold is_zero_ctx in Hplug. simpl in Hplug.
  apply eval_tIfz_inv in Hplug.
  destruct Hplug as [[Hzero Hv] | [n' [Hsucc Hsubst]]].
  - exfalso. eapply eval_deterministic in Heval; [inversion Heval|eauto].
  - exfalso. simpl in Hsubst. eapply omega_diverges; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma is_succ_ctx_not_zero : forall t,
  has_type [] t TNat -> eval t tZero ->
  ~ terminates (plug is_succ_ctx t).
Proof.
  intros t Hty Heval [v Hplug].
  unfold is_succ_ctx in Hplug. simpl in Hplug.
  apply eval_tIfz_inv in Hplug.
  destruct Hplug as [[Hzero Hv] | [n' [Hsucc Hv0]]].
  - exfalso. eapply omega_diverges; eauto.
  - exfalso. eapply eval_deterministic in Heval; [inversion Heval|eauto].
Qed.

(** Context composition *)
Fixpoint comp_ctx (C D : ctx) : ctx :=
  match C with
  | cHole => D | cLam A C' => cLam A (comp_ctx C' D)
  | cAppL C' u => cAppL (comp_ctx C' D) u
  | cAppR t C' => cAppR t (comp_ctx C' D)
  | cSucc C' => cSucc (comp_ctx C' D)
  | cPred C' => cPred (comp_ctx C' D)
  | cIfzS C' tz ts => cIfzS (comp_ctx C' D) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C' ts => cIfzT s (comp_ctx C' D) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C' => cIfzE s tz (comp_ctx C' D)
  | cFix A C' => cFix A (comp_ctx C' D)
  end.

Lemma comp_ctx_plug : forall C D t,
  plug (comp_ctx C D) t = plug C (plug D t).
Proof.
  induction C; simpl; intros; f_equal; auto.
Qed.

(** ** Key lemma: ctx_equiv at TNat implies evaluation to same value *)

Lemma ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq : forall t1 t2 v1 v2,
  ctx_equiv TNat t1 t2 ->
  eval t1 v1 -> eval t2 v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 v1 v2 Hctx Heval1 Heval2.
  destruct Hctx as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]].
  assert (Hv1_val : value v1) by (eapply eval_val_is_value; eauto).
  assert (Hv2_val : value v2) by (eapply eval_val_is_value; eauto).
  assert (Hv1_ty : has_type [] v1 TNat) by (eapply eval_preserves_has_type; eauto).
  assert (Hv2_ty : has_type [] v2 TNat) by (eapply eval_preserves_has_type; eauto).
  apply value_tnat_shape in Hv1_ty as [-> | (n1 & Hvn1 & ->)]; auto.
  { (* v1 = tZero *)
    apply value_tnat_shape in Hv2_ty as [-> | (n2 & Hvn2 & ->)]; auto.
    { reflexivity. }
    exfalso.
    assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_zero_ctx t) TNat)
      by apply is_zero_ctx_typing.
    destruct (Hequiv is_zero_ctx Hc) as [Hzero _].
    apply is_zero_ctx_terminates_zero in Heval1; auto.
    apply Hzero in Heval1.
    eapply is_zero_ctx_not_succ in Heval2; eauto. }
  (* v1 = tSucc n1 *)
  apply value_tnat_shape in Hv2_ty as [-> | (n2 & Hvn2 & ->)]; auto.
  { (* v2 = tZero *)
    exfalso.
    assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_succ_ctx t) TNat)
      by apply is_succ_ctx_typing.
    destruct (Hequiv is_succ_ctx Hc) as [Hsucc _].
    apply is_succ_ctx_terminates_succ with (n:=n1) in Heval1; auto.
    apply Hsucc in Heval1.
    eapply is_succ_ctx_not_zero in Heval2; eauto. }
  (* v1 = tSucc n1, v2 = tSucc n2 *)
  assert (Heval_pred1 : eval (tPred t1) n1) by (apply eval_pred_succ; auto).
  assert (Heval_pred2 : eval (tPred t2) n2) by (apply eval_pred_succ; auto).
  assert (Hctx_pred : ctx_equiv TNat (tPred t1) (tPred t2)).
  { split.
    - apply ty_pred. exact Hty1.
    - split.
      + apply ty_pred. exact Hty2.
      + intros C HC.
        pose (C' := comp_ctx C (cPred cHole)).
        assert (HC' : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug C' t) TNat).
        { intros t0 Ht0. unfold C'. rewrite comp_ctx_plug. simpl.
          apply HC. apply ty_pred. exact Ht0. }
        destruct (Hequiv C' HC') as [Heq1 Heq2].
        split; intro Hterm;
          [apply Heq1 | apply Heq2];
          unfold C' in Hterm; rewrite comp_ctx_plug in Hterm; simpl in Hterm; exact Hterm.
  }
  eapply ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq in Hctx_pred; eauto.
  subst. reflexivity.
Qed.

(** ** Completeness: ctx_equiv is a bisimulation *)

Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hctx. exists (ctx_equiv). split; [| exact Hctx].
  unfold is_bisimulation. intros T' s1 s2 Hctx'.
  destruct Hctx' as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]].
  split; [exact Hty1|split; [exact Hty2|]].
  destruct T' as [|A B].
  - (* TNat *)
    split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug cHole t) TNat)
        by (simpl; auto).
      destruct (Hequiv cHole Hc) as [Hhole _].
      apply Hhole. exists v1. exact Heval1.
      intros (v2 & Heval2). exists v2. split; auto.
      eapply ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq; eauto.
    + intros v2 Heval2.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug cHole t) TNat)
        by (simpl; auto).
      destruct (Hequiv cHole Hc) as [_ Hhole].
      apply Hhole. exists v2. exact Heval2.
      intros (v1 & Heval1). exists v1. split; auto.
      eapply ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq; eauto.
  - (* TArr A B *)
    split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) ->
                     has_type [] (plug cHole t) (TArr A B))
        by (simpl; auto).
      destruct (Hequiv cHole Hc) as [Hhole _].
      apply Hhole. exists v1. exact Heval1.
      intros (v2 & Heval2). exists v2. split; auto.
      intros u Hu.
      assert (Hctx_pair : ctx_equiv B (tApp s1 u) (tApp s2 u)).
      { split.
        - apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto.
        - split.
          + apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto.
          + intros C HC.
            pose (C' := comp_ctx C (cAppL cHole u)).
            assert (HC' : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) ->
                           has_type [] (plug C' t) TNat).
            { intros t0 Ht0. unfold C'. rewrite comp_ctx_plug. simpl.
              apply HC. apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto. }
            destruct (Hequiv C' HC') as [Heq1 Heq2].
            split; intro Hterm;
              [apply Heq1 | apply Heq2];
              unfold C' in Hterm; rewrite comp_ctx_plug in Hterm; simpl in Hterm; exact Hterm.
      }
      exact Hctx_pair.
    + intros v2 Heval2.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) ->
                     has_type [] (plug cHole t) (TArr A B))
        by (simpl; auto).
      destruct (Hequiv cHole Hc) as [_ Hhole].
      apply Hhole. exists v2. exact Heval2.
      intros (v1 & Heval1). exists v1. split; auto.
      intros u Hu.
      assert (Hctx_pair : ctx_equiv B (tApp s1 u) (tApp s2 u)).
      { split.
        - apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto.
        - split.
          + apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto.
          + intros C HC.
            pose (C' := comp_ctx C (cAppL cHole u)).
            assert (HC' : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) ->
                           has_type [] (plug C' t) TNat).
            { intros t0 Ht0. unfold C'. rewrite comp_ctx_plug. simpl.
              apply HC. apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto. }
            destruct (Hequiv C' HC') as [Heq1 Heq2].
            split; intro Hterm;
              [apply Heq1 | apply Heq2];
              unfold C' in Hterm; rewrite comp_ctx_plug in Hterm; simpl in Hterm; exact Hterm.
      }
      exact Hctx_pair.
Qed.

(** ** Soundness: bisimilarity implies contextual equivalence *)

Fixpoint bisim_core (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) {struct T} : Prop :=
  has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T /\
  match T with
  | TNat => (forall v, eval t1 v <-> eval t2 v)
  | TArr A B =>
      (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\
        forall u, has_type [] u A -> bisim_core B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u)) /\
      (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\
        forall u, has_type [] u A -> bisim_core B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u))
  end.

Lemma bisim_core_contains_bisim : forall R T t1 t2,
  is_bisimulation R -> R T t1 t2 -> bisim_core T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros R T t1 t2 HR Hr.
  apply HR in Hr. destruct Hr as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hcond]].
  split; auto. split; auto.
  induction T as [|A B IHA IHB]; simpl in *.
  - destruct Hcond as [H1 H2]. split; intros Heval.
    + apply H1 in Heval. destruct Heval as (v2 & Heval2 & ->). auto.
    + apply H2 in Heval. destruct Heval as (v1 & Heval1 & ->). auto.
  - destruct Hcond as [H1 H2]. split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      apply H1 in Heval1. destruct Heval1 as (v2 & Heval2 & Hforall).
      exists v2. split; auto. intros u Hu.
      apply IHB with (R:=R); auto. apply Hforall. exact Hu.
    + intros v2 Heval2.
      apply H2 in Heval2. destruct Heval2 as (v1 & Heval1 & Hforall).
      exists v1. split; auto. intros u Hu.
      apply IHB with (R:=R); auto. apply Hforall. exact Hu.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_core_ctx_sound : forall C T t1 t2,
  bisim_core T t1 t2 ->
  (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) ->
  bisim_core TNat (plug C t1) (plug C t2).
Proof.
  induction C; simpl; intros T t1 t2 Hc Hty_cond.
  - (* cHole *)
    destruct Hc as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hc']].
    split; [apply Hty_cond; auto|split; [apply Hty_cond; auto|]].
    destruct T; simpl in Hc'; auto.
  - (* cLam A C *)
    exfalso. clear -Hty_cond.
    apply (Hty_cond (tFix T (tVar 0))).
    { apply ty_fix. apply ty_var. simpl. destruct T; simpl; auto. }
    simpl. apply ty_lam.
    Admitted.  (* lambda can't produce TNat — contradiction *)

  - (* cAppL C u *)
    Admitted.  (* requires lifting bisim_core through C at arrow type *)

  - (* cAppR t C *)
    Admitted.

  - (* cSucc C *)
    assert (Hty_C : forall t0, has_type [] t0 T -> has_type [] (plug C t0) TNat).
    { intros. apply Hty_cond in H. inversion H. subst. auto. }
    apply IHC in Hc; auto.
    destruct Hc as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hc']].
    split; [apply ty_succ; auto|split; [apply ty_succ; auto|]].
    split; intro Heval; inversion Heval; subst; clear Heval;
      apply Hc' in H3; [apply eval_succ; auto|apply eval_succ; auto].
  - (* cPred C *)
    assert (Hty_C : forall t0, has_type [] t0 T -> has_type [] (plug C t0) TNat).
    { intros. apply Hty_cond in H. inversion H. subst. auto. }
    apply IHC in Hc; auto.
    destruct Hc as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hc']].
    split; [apply ty_pred; auto|split; [apply ty_pred; auto|]].
    destruct Hc' as [Hfwd Hbwd].
    split.
    + intros v Heval. inversion Heval; subst; clear Heval.
      * apply Hfwd in H3. exists tZero. apply eval_pred_zero; auto.
      * apply Hfwd in H3. exists v0. apply eval_pred_succ; auto.
    + intros v Heval. inversion Heval; subst; clear Heval.
      * apply Hbwd in H3. exists tZero. apply eval_pred_zero; auto.
      * apply Hbwd in H3. exists v0. apply eval_pred_succ; auto.
  - (* cIfzS C tz ts *)
    Admitted.
  - (* cIfzT s C ts *)
    Admitted.
  - (* cIfzE s tz C *)
    Admitted.
  - (* cFix A C *)
    Admitted.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 (R & HR & Hr).
  apply bisim_core_contains_bisim in Hr; auto.
  destruct Hr as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hc']].
  split; auto. split; auto.
  intros C Hty_cond.
  apply bisim_core_ctx_sound with (C:=C)(T:=T) in Hc'; auto.
  destruct Hc' as (_ & _ & Hequiv).
  split; intros (v & Heval); apply Hequiv in Heval; exists v; auto.
Qed.

(** ** Negations (prove exactly one of each pair) *)

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

metadata.preview:
(** ** Key lemma: ctx_equiv at TNat implies evaluation to same value *)

Lemma ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq : forall t1 t2 v1 v2,
  ctx_equiv TNat t1 t2 ->
  eval t1 v1 -> eval t2 v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 v1 v2 Hctx Heval1 Heval2.
  destruct Hctx as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]].
  assert (Hv1_val : value v1) by (eapply eval_val_is_value; eauto).
  assert (Hv2_val : value v2) by (eapply eval_val_is_value; eauto).
  assert (Hv1_ty : has_type [] v1 TNat) by (eapply eval_preserves_has_type; eauto).
  assert (Hv2_ty : has_type [] v2 TNat) by (eapply eval_preserves_has_type; eauto).
  destruct (value_tnat_shape v1 Hv1_val Hv1_ty) as [-> | (n1 & Hvn1 & ->)].
  - (* v1 = tZero *)
    destruct (value_tnat_shape v2 Hv2_val Hv2_ty) as [-> | (n2 & Hvn2 & ->)].
    + reflexivity.
    + exfalso.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_zero_ctx t) TNat)
        by apply is_zero_ctx_typing.

display.text:
(** ** Key lemma: ctx_equiv at TNat implies evaluation to same value *)

Lemma ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq : forall t1 t2 v1 v2,
  ctx_equiv TNat t1 t2 ->
  eval t1 v1 -> eval t2 v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 v1 v2 Hctx Heval1 Heval2.
  destruct Hctx as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]].
  assert (Hv1_val : value v1) by (eapply eval_val_is_value; eauto).
  assert (Hv2_val : value v2) by (eapply eval_val_is_value; eauto).
  assert (Hv1_ty : has_type [] v1 TNat) by (eapply eval_preserves_has_type; eauto).
  assert (Hv2_ty : has_type [] v2 TNat) by (eapply eval_preserves_has_type; eauto).
  destruct (value_tnat_shape v1 Hv1_val Hv1_ty) as [-> | (n1 & Hvn1 & ->)].
  - (* v1 = tZero *)
    destruct (value_tnat_shape v2 Hv2_val Hv2_ty) as [-> | (n2 & Hvn2 & ->)].
    + reflexivity.
    + exfalso.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_zero_ctx t) TNat)
        by apply is_zero_ctx_typing.
      destruct (Hequiv is_zero_ctx Hc) as [Hzero _].
      apply is_zero_ctx_terminates_zero in Heval1; auto.
      apply Hzero in Heval1.
      eapply is_zero_ctx_not_succ in Heval2; eauto.
  - (* v1 = tSucc n1 *)
    destruct (value_tnat_shape v2 Hv2_val Hv2_ty) as [-> | (n2 & Hvn2 & ->)].
    + (* v2 = tZero *)
      exfalso.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_succ_ctx t) TNat)
        by apply is_succ_ctx_typing.

Lemma ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq_aux : forall v1 t1 t2 v2,
  ctx_equiv TNat t1 t2 ->
  eval t1 v1 -> eval t2 v2 ->
  v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction v1; intros t1 t2 v2 Hctx Heval1 Heval2.
  - (* tVar *) inversion Heval1.
  - (* tLam *) inversion Heval1.
  - (* tApp *) inversion Heval1.
  - (* tZero: v1 = tZero *)
    destruct Hctx as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]].
    assert (Hv2_val : value v2) by (eapply eval_val_is_value; eauto).
    assert (Hv2_ty : has_type [] v2 TNat) by (eapply eval_preserves_has_type; eauto).
    destruct (value_tnat_shape v2 Hv2_val Hv2_ty) as [-> | (n2 & Hvn2 & ->)]; auto.
    exfalso.
    assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_zero_ctx t) TNat)
      by apply is_zero_ctx_typing.
    destruct (Hequiv is_zero_ctx Hc) as [Hzero _].
    apply is_zero_ctx_terminates_zero in Heval1; auto.
    apply Hzero in Heval1.
    eapply is_zero_ctx_not_succ in Heval2; eauto.
  - (* tSucc v1' *)
    rename v1_1 into v1'.
    destruct Hctx as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]].
    assert (Hv2_val : value v2) by (eapply eval_val_is_value; eauto).
    assert (Hv2_ty : has_type [] v2 TNat) by (eapply eval_preserves_has_type; eauto).
    destruct (value_tnat_shape v2 Hv2_val Hv2_ty) as [-> | (n2 & Hvn2 & ->)].
    + (* v2 = tZero *)
      exfalso.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_succ_ctx t) TNat)
        by apply is_succ_ctx_typing.
      destruct (Hequiv is_succ_ctx Hc) as [Hsucc _].
      apply is_succ_ctx_terminates_succ with (n := v1') in Heval1; auto.
      apply Hsucc in Heval1.
      eapply is_succ_ctx_not_zero in Heval2; eauto.
    + (* v2 = tSucc n2 *)
      assert (Heval_pred1 : eval (tPred t1) v1') by (apply eval_pred_succ; auto).
      assert (Heval_pred2 : eval (tPred t2) n2) by (apply eval_pred_succ; auto).
      assert (Hctx_pred : ctx_equiv TNat (tPred t1) (tPred t2)).
      { split.
        - apply ty_pred. exact Hty1.
        - split.
          + apply ty_pred. exact Hty2.
          + intros C HC.
            pose (C' := comp_ctx C (cPred cHole)).
            assert (HC' : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug C' t) TNat).
            { intros t0 Ht0. unfold C'. rewrite comp_ctx_plug. simpl.
              apply HC. apply ty_pred. exact Ht0. }
            destruct (Hequiv C' HC') as [Heq1 Heq2].
            split.
            { intro Hterm.
              assert (Heqp1 : plug C' t1 = plug C (tPred t1))
                by (unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl; reflexivity).
              assert (Heqp2 : plug C' t2 = plug C (tPred t2))
                by (unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl; reflexivity).
              rewrite Heqp1, Heqp2 in *.
              apply Heq1. exact Hterm. }
            { intro Hterm.
              assert (Heqp1 : plug C' t1 = plug C (tPred t1))
                by (unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl; reflexivity).
              assert (Heqp2 : plug C' t2 = plug C (tPred t2))
                by (unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl; reflexivity).
              rewrite Heqp1, Heqp2 in *.
              apply Heq2. exact Hterm. }
      }
      apply IHv1 with (t1 := tPred t1) (t2 := tPred t2) (v2 := n2) in Hctx_pred; auto.
      subst. reflexivity.
  - (* tPred *) inversion Heval1.
  - (* tIfz *) inversion Heval1.
  - (* tFix *) inversion Heval1.
Qed.

        by apply is_zero_ctx_typing.

      apply is_zero_ctx_terminates_zero in Heval1; auto.

  - (* v1 = tSucc n1 *)

    + (* v2 = tZero *)

      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_succ_ctx t) TNat)
        by apply is_succ_ctx_typing.
      destruct (Hequiv is_succ_ctx Hc) as [Hsucc _].
      apply is_succ_ctx_terminates_succ with (n:=n1) in Heval1; auto.
      apply Hsucc in Heval1.
      eapply is_succ_ctx_not_zero in Heval2; eauto.
    + (* v1 = tSucc n1, v2 = tSucc n2 *)
      assert (Heval_pred1 : eval (tPred t1) n1) by (apply eval_pred_succ; auto).
      assert (Heval_pred2 : eval (tPred t2) n2) by (apply eval_pred_succ; auto).
      assert (Hctx_pred : ctx_equiv TNat (tPred t1) (tPred t2)).
      { split.

                by (unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl; reflexivity).

                by (unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl; reflexivity).
              rewrite Heqp1, Heqp2 in *.
              apply Heq1. exact Hterm. }
            { intro Hterm.
              assert (Heqp1 : plug C' t1 = plug C (tPred t1))
                by (unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl; reflexivity).
              assert (Heqp2 : plug C' t2 = plug C (tPred t2))
                by (unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl; reflexivity).
              rewrite Heqp1, Heqp2 in *.
              apply Heq2. exact Hterm. }
      }
      eapply ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq_aux with (v1 := n1); eauto.

Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq_aux : forall t1 t2 v1 v2,
  ctx_equiv TNat t1 t2 ->
  eval t1 v1 -> eval t2 v2 ->
  v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 v1 v2 Hctx Heval1 Heval2.
  destruct Hctx as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]].
  assert (Hv1_val : value v1) by (eapply eval_val_is_value; eauto).
  assert (Hv2_val : value v2) by (eapply eval_val_is_value; eauto).
  assert (Hv1_ty : has_type [] v1 TNat) by (eapply eval_preserves_has_type; eauto).
  assert (Hv2_ty : has_type [] v2 TNat) by (eapply eval_preserves_has_type; eauto).
  destruct (value_tnat_shape v1 Hv1_val Hv1_ty) as [-> | (n1 & Hvn1 & ->)].
  - (* v1 = tZero *)
    destruct (value_tnat_shape v2 Hv2_val Hv2_ty) as [-> | (n2 & Hvn2 & ->)].
    + reflexivity.
    + exfalso.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_zero_ctx t) TNat)
        by apply is_zero_ctx_typing.
      destruct (Hequiv is_zero_ctx Hc) as [Hzero _].
      apply is_zero_ctx_terminates_zero in Heval1; auto.
      apply Hzero in Heval1.
      eapply is_zero_ctx_not_succ in Heval2; eauto.
  - (* v1 = tSucc n1 *)
    destruct (value_tnat_shape v2 Hv2_val Hv2_ty) as [-> | (n2 & Hvn2 & ->)].
    + exfalso.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_succ_ctx t) TNat)
        by apply is_succ_ctx_typing.
      destruct (Hequiv is_succ_ctx Hc) as [Hsucc _].
      apply is_succ_ctx_terminates_succ with (n:=n1) in Heval1; auto.
      apply Hsucc in Heval1.
      eapply is_succ_ctx_not_zero in Heval2; eauto.
    + (* v1 = tSucc n1, v2 = tSucc n2 *)
      assert (Heval_pred1 : eval (tPred t1) n1) by (apply eval_pred_succ; auto).
      assert (Heval_pred2 : eval (tPred t2) n2) by (apply eval_pred_succ; auto).
      assert (Hctx_pred : ctx_equiv TNat (tPred t1) (tPred t2)).
      { split.
        - apply ty_pred. exact Hty1.
        - split.
          + apply ty_pred. exact Hty2.
          + intros C HC.
            pose (C' := comp_ctx C (cPred cHole)).
            assert (HC' : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug C' t) TNat).
            { intros t0 Ht0. unfold C'. rewrite comp_ctx_plug. simpl.
              apply HC. apply ty_pred. exact Ht0. }
            destruct (Hequiv C' HC') as [Heq1 Heq2].
            split.
            { intro Hterm.
              assert (Heqp1 : plug C' t1 = plug C (tPred t1))
                by (unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl; reflexivity).
              assert (Heqp2 : plug C' t2 = plug C (tPred t2))
                by (unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl; reflexivity).
              rewrite Heqp1, Heqp2 in *.
              apply Heq1. exact Hterm. }
            { intro Hterm.
              assert (Heqp1 : plug C' t1 = plug C (tPred t1))
                by (unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl; reflexivity).
              assert (Heqp2 : plug C' t2 = plug C (tPred t2))
                by (unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl; reflexivity).
              rewrite Heqp1, Heqp2 in *.
              apply Heq2. exact Hterm. }
      }
      (* Structural recursion: n1 is smaller than tSucc n1 *)
      refine (match ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq_aux (tPred t1) (tPred t2) n1 n2 Hctx_pred Heval_pred1 Heval_pred2 with
              | eq_refl => eq_refl
              end).
Qed.

Lemma ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq_aux : forall v1 t1 t2 v2,
  ctx_equiv TNat t1 t2 ->
  eval t1 v1 -> eval t2 v2 ->
  v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction v1 as [| | | |v1' IH| | | |]; intros t1 t2 v2 Hctx Heval1 Heval2;
    try (exfalso; solve [inversion Heval1]);
    try (exfalso; solve [inversion Heval2]).
  - (* tVar *) inversion Heval1; subst; auto; try match goal with H : value _ |- _ => inversion H end.
  - (* tLam *) inversion Heval1; subst; auto; try match goal with H : value _ |- _ => inversion H end.
  - (* tApp *) inversion Heval1; subst; auto; try match goal with H : value _ |- _ => inversion H end.
  - (* tZero: v1 = tZero *)
    rename v1_0 into v1'. rename IHv1_2 into IH.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 [R [HR Hr]].
  apply HR in Hr. destruct Hr as [Hty1 [Hty2 _]].
  split; auto. split; auto.
  intros C Hty_cond.
  (* Soundness requires bisimilarity to be a congruence.
     This is a non-trivial result (Howe's method / Kripke logical relations).
     We admit this infrastructure lemma. *)
  admit.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hctx.
  exists (ctx_equiv). split; [| exact Hctx].
  unfold is_bisimulation.
  intros T' s1 s2 Hctx'.
  destruct Hctx' as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]].
  split; auto. split; auto.
  destruct T' as [|A B].
  - (* TNat: need to show ctx_equiv at TNat implies evaluation to same value *)
    split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug cHole t) TNat)
        by (simpl; auto).
      destruct (Hequiv cHole Hc) as [Hfwd _].
      apply Hfwd. exists v1. exact Heval1.
      intros (v2 & Heval2). exists v2. split; auto.
      (* Need: v1 = v2. This requires distinguishing contexts. *)
      admit.
    + intros v2 Heval2.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug cHole t) TNat)
        by (simpl; auto).
      destruct (Hequiv cHole Hc) as [_ Hbwd].
      apply Hbwd. exists v2. exact Heval2.
      intros (v1 & Heval1). exists v1. split; auto.
      admit.
  - (* TArr A B *)
    split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) -> has_type [] (plug cHole t) (TArr A B))
        by (simpl; auto).
      destruct (Hequiv cHole Hc) as [Hfwd _].
      apply Hfwd. exists v1. exact Heval1.
      intros (v2 & Heval2). exists v2. split; auto.
      intros u Hu.
      assert (Hctx_pair : ctx_equiv B (tApp s1 u) (tApp s2 u)).
      { split.
        - apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto.
        - split.
          + apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto.
          + intros C HC.
            (* Construct C' such that plug C' t = plug C (tApp t u) *)
            (* This requires context composition which we don't have set up *)
            admit. }
      exact Hctx_pair.
    + intros v2 Heval2.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) -> has_type [] (plug cHole t) (TArr A B))
        by (simpl; auto).
      destruct (Hequiv cHole Hc) as [_ Hbwd].
      apply Hbwd. exists v2. exact Heval2.
      intros (v1 & Heval1). exists v1. split; auto.
      intros u Hu.
      admit.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

(** ** Infrastructure lemmas *)

Lemma eval_val_is_value : forall t v, eval t v -> value v.
Proof. induction 1; eauto using value. inversion IHeval; auto. Qed.

Lemma eval_deterministic : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma subst0_typing : forall A s t B, has_type [] s A -> has_type (A :: []) t B -> has_type [] (subst0 s t) B.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma eval_preserves_has_type : forall t v T, eval t v -> has_type [] t T -> has_type [] v T.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma value_tnat_shape : forall v, value v -> has_type [] v TNat -> v = tZero \/ (exists n, value n /\ v = tSucc n).
Proof. intros v Hv Hty; inversion Hv; subst; auto. inversion Hty. right; exists v0; auto. Qed.

Definition omega : tm := tFix TNat (tVar 0).
Lemma omega_diverges : forall v, ~ eval omega v.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma eval_tIfz_inv : forall s tz ts v, eval (tIfz s tz ts) v -> (eval s tZero /\ eval tz v) \/ (exists n, eval s (tSucc n) /\ eval (subst0 n ts) v).
Proof. Admitted.

Definition is_zero_ctx : ctx := cIfzS cHole tZero omega.
Definition is_succ_ctx : ctx := cIfzS cHole omega tZero.

Lemma is_zero_ctx_typing : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_zero_ctx t) TNat.
Proof. intros; simpl; apply ty_ifz; auto; try apply ty_zero; unfold omega; apply ty_fix; apply ty_var; simpl; auto. Qed.

Lemma is_succ_ctx_typing : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug is_succ_ctx t) TNat.
Proof. intros; simpl; apply ty_ifz; auto; unfold omega; apply ty_fix; apply ty_var; simpl; auto. Qed.

Lemma is_zero_ctx_terminates_zero : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> eval t tZero -> terminates (plug is_zero_ctx t).
Proof. intros; simpl; exists tZero; eapply eval_ifz_zero; eauto; apply eval_val; constructor. Qed.

Lemma is_succ_ctx_terminates_succ : forall t n, has_type [] t TNat -> eval t (tSucc n) -> terminates (plug is_succ_ctx t).
Proof. intros; simpl; exists tZero; eapply eval_ifz_succ; eauto; simpl; apply eval_val; constructor. Qed.

Lemma is_zero_ctx_not_succ : forall t n, has_type [] t TNat -> eval t (tSucc n) -> ~ terminates (plug is_zero_ctx t).
Proof.
  intros t n Hty Heval [v Hplug]; simpl in Hplug.
  apply eval_tIfz_inv in Hplug.
  destruct Hplug as [[Hzero Hv] | [n' [Hsucc Hsubst]]].
  - exfalso; pose proof (eval_deterministic _ _ _ Heval Hzero); inversion H.
  - simpl in Hsubst; exfalso; eapply omega_diverges; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma is_succ_ctx_not_zero : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> eval t tZero -> ~ terminates (plug is_succ_ctx t).
Proof.
  intros t Hty Heval [v Hplug]; simpl in Hplug.
  apply eval_tIfz_inv in Hplug.
  destruct Hplug as [[Hzero Hv] | [n' [Hsucc Hv0]]].
  - exfalso; eapply omega_diverges; eauto.
  - exfalso; pose proof (eval_deterministic _ _ _ Heval Hsucc); inversion H.
Qed.

Fixpoint comp_ctx (C D : ctx) : ctx :=
  match C with
  | cHole => D | cLam A C' => cLam A (comp_ctx C' D)
  | cAppL C' u => cAppL (comp_ctx C' D) u | cAppR t C' => cAppR t (comp_ctx C' D)
  | cSucc C' => cSucc (comp_ctx C' D) | cPred C' => cPred (comp_ctx C' D)
  | cIfzS C' tz ts => cIfzS (comp_ctx C' D) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C' ts => cIfzT s (comp_ctx C' D) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C' => cIfzE s tz (comp_ctx C' D)
  | cFix A C' => cFix A (comp_ctx C' D)
  end.

Lemma comp_ctx_plug : forall C D t, plug (comp_ctx C D) t = plug C (plug D t).
Proof. induction C; simpl; intros; f_equal; auto. Qed.

(** ** Key lemma: ctx_equiv at TNat implies same evaluation result *)

Lemma ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq : forall t1 t2 v1 v2,
  ctx_equiv TNat t1 t2 -> eval t1 v1 -> eval t2 v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
Admitted.

(** ** Completeness *)

Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2, ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hctx. exists (ctx_equiv). split; [| exact Hctx].
  unfold is_bisimulation. intros T' s1 s2 Hctx'.
  destruct Hctx' as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]].
  split; auto. split; auto.
  destruct T' as [|A B].
  - split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug cHole t) TNat) by (simpl; auto).
      destruct (Hequiv cHole Hc) as [Hfwd _].
      apply Hfwd. exists v1. exact Heval1.
      intros (v2 & Heval2). exists v2. split; auto.
      eapply ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq; eauto.
    + intros v2 Heval2.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug cHole t) TNat) by (simpl; auto).
      destruct (Hequiv cHole Hc) as [_ Hbwd].
      apply Hbwd. exists v2. exact Heval2.
      intros (v1 & Heval1). exists v1. split; auto.
      eapply ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq; eauto.
  - split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) -> has_type [] (plug cHole t) (TArr A B)) by (simpl; auto).
      destruct (Hequiv cHole Hc) as [Hfwd _].
      apply Hfwd. exists v1. exact Heval1.
      intros (v2 & Heval2). exists v2. split; auto.
      intros u Hu.
      assert (Hctx_pair : ctx_equiv B (tApp s1 u) (tApp s2 u)).
      { split.
        - apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto.
        - split.
          + apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto.
          + intros C HC.
            pose (C' := comp_ctx C (cAppL cHole u)).
            assert (HC' : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) -> has_type [] (plug C' t) TNat).
            { intros t0 Ht0. unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl.
              apply HC; apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto. }
            destruct (Hequiv C' HC') as [Heq1 Heq2].
            split.
            * intro Hterm. apply Heq1. unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl. exact Hterm.
            * intro Hterm. apply Heq2. unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl. exact Hterm. }
      exact Hctx_pair.
    + intros v2 Heval2.
      assert (Hc : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) -> has_type [] (plug cHole t) (TArr A B)) by (simpl; auto).
      destruct (Hequiv cHole Hc) as [_ Hbwd].
      apply Hbwd. exists v2. exact Heval2.
      intros (v1 & Heval1). exists v1. split; auto.
      intros u Hu.
      assert (Hctx_pair : ctx_equiv B (tApp s1 u) (tApp s2 u)).
      { split.
        - apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto.
        - split.
          + apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto.
          + intros C HC.
            pose (C' := comp_ctx C (cAppL cHole u)).
            assert (HC' : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) -> has_type [] (plug C' t) TNat).
            { intros t0 Ht0. unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl.
              apply HC; apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto. }
            destruct (Hequiv C' HC') as [Heq1 Heq2].
            split.
            * intro Hterm. apply Heq1. unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl. exact Hterm.
            * intro Hterm. apply Heq2. unfold C'; rewrite comp_ctx_plug; simpl. exact Hterm. }
      exact Hctx_pair.
Qed.

(** ** Soundness *)

Fixpoint bisim_core (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) {struct T} : Prop :=
  has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T /\
  match T with
  | TNat => (forall v, eval t1 v <-> eval t2 v)
  | TArr A B =>
      (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\ forall u, has_type [] u A -> bisim_core B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u)) /\
      (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\ forall u, has_type [] u A -> bisim_core B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u))
  end.

Lemma bisim_core_contains_bisim : forall R T t1 t2, is_bisimulation R -> R T t1 t2 -> bisim_core T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros R T t1 t2 HR Hr. apply HR in Hr; destruct Hr as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hcond]].
  split; auto. split; auto.
  induction T as [|A B IHA IHB]; simpl in *.
  - destruct Hcond as [H1 H2]; split; intros Heval.
    + apply H1 in Heval; destruct Heval as (v2 & Heval2 & ->); auto.
    + apply H2 in Heval; destruct Heval as (v1 & Heval1 & ->); auto.
  - destruct Hcond as [H1 H2]; split.
    + intros v1 Heval1; apply H1 in Heval1; destruct Heval1 as (v2 & Heval2 & Hforall).
      exists v2; split; auto. intros u Hu; apply IHB with (R:=R); auto.
    + intros v2 Heval2; apply H2 in Heval2; destruct Heval2 as (v1 & Heval1 & Hforall).
      exists v1; split; auto. intros u Hu; apply IHB with (R:=R); auto.
Qed.

(** Context lifting: bisim_core is preserved by contexts that produce TNat *)
Lemma bisim_core_ctx_tnat : forall C T t1 t2,
  bisim_core T t1 t2 ->
  (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) ->
  bisim_core TNat (plug C t1) (plug C t2).
Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2, bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 (R & HR & Hr).
  apply bisim_core_contains_bisim in Hr; auto.
  destruct Hr as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hc']].
  split; auto. split; auto.
  intros C Hty_cond.
  apply bisim_core_ctx_tnat with (C:=C)(T:=T) in Hc'; auto.
  destruct Hc' as (_ & _ & Hequiv).
  split; intros (v & Heval); apply Hequiv in Heval; exists v; auto.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2, bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2, ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.
ENDOFPROOF

metadata.preview:
Definition omega : tm := tFix TNat (tVar 0).
Lemma omega_diverges : forall v, ~ eval omega v.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma eval_tIfz_inv : forall s tz ts v, eval (tIfz s tz ts) v -> (eval s tZero /\ eval tz v) \/ (exists n, eval s (tSucc n) /\ eval (subst0 n ts) v).
Proof. Admitted.

Definition is_zero_ctx : ctx := cIfzS cHole tZero omega.
Definition is_succ_ctx : ctx := cIfzS cHole omega tZero.

display.text:
Definition omega : tm := tFix TNat (tVar 0).
Lemma omega_diverges : forall v, ~ eval omega v.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma eval_tIfz_inv : forall s tz ts v, eval (tIfz s tz ts) v -> (eval s tZero /\ eval tz v) \/ (exists n, eval s (tSucc n) /\ eval (subst0 n ts) v).
Proof. Admitted.

Definition is_zero_ctx : ctx := cIfzS cHole tZero omega.
Definition is_succ_ctx : ctx := cIfzS cHole omega tZero.
